info.title: API Rewrite
info.summary: Référence de l'API Projets (Projets, clés API, modèles, webhooks).
info.description:
Référence publique complète des points de terminaison au niveau projet de l'API Rewrite v1.

Tous les endpoints renvoient une enveloppe cohérente (`ok`, `data` et `cursor` optionnel).
Utilisez soit un jeton Bearer (clé API) avec des scopes, soit une session cookie authentifiée.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Enregistrer et gérer les webhooks d'événements de livraison.

get.description:
Liste les endpoints webhook configurés pour ce projet.

Utilisez `limit`, `after` et `before` pour paginer.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
x-codeSamples.source:
from rewrite import Client

client = Client("rw_your_api_key")

webhooks = client.webhooks.list({"limit": 20})

x-codeSamples.label: Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$webhooks = $rewrite->webhooks->list([
  'limit' => 20,
]);

x-codeSamples.label: Ruby
x-codeSamples.source:
require "rewrite"

rewrite = Rewrite::Client.new(api_key: ENV.fetch("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

webhooks = rewrite.webhooks.list(limit: 20)

x-codeSamples.label: Kotlin
Swift
C#

post.description: Crée un endpoint webhook et des abonnements aux événements.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$webhook = $rewrite->webhooks->create([
  'name' => 'Delivery events',
  'endpoint' => 'https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite',
  'events' => ['sms.queued', 'sms.delivered', 'sms.failed'],
]);

x-codeSamples.label: Ruby
x-codeSamples.source:
require "rewrite"

rewrite = Rewrite::Client.new(api_key: ENV.fetch("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

webhook = rewrite.webhooks.create(
  name: "Delivery events",
  endpoint: "https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite",
  events: ["sms.queued", "sms.delivered", "sms.failed"]
)

Swift

x-codeSamples.source:
from rewrite import Client

client = Client("rw_your_api_key")

webhook_id = "748395130237498700"

webhook = client.webhooks.get(webhook_id)

x-codeSamples.label: Java

x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

x-codeSamples.label: Ruby
x-codeSamples.source:
require "rewrite"

rewrite = Rewrite::Client.new(api_key: ENV.fetch("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

webhook_id = "748395130237498700"

webhook = rewrite.webhooks.get(webhook_id)

x-codeSamples.label: Kotlin
x-codeSamples.source:
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.Rewrite

fun main() {
  val rewrite = Rewrite(System.getenv("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

  val webhookId = "748395130237498700"

  val webhook = rewrite.webhooks.get(webhookId)

  println(webhook)
}

x-codeSamples.label: Swift
C#

patch.description: Met à jour l'endpoint webhook, les événements, le nom ou le statut.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
x-codeSamples.source:
from rewrite import Client, WebhookEventType, WebhookStatus

client = Client("rw_your_api_key")

webhook_id = "748395130237498700"

webhook = client.webhooks.update(
    webhook_id,
    {
        "endpoint": "https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite-v2",
        "events": [
            WebhookEventType.SMS_DELIVERED,
            WebhookEventType.SMS_FAILED,
        ],
        "status": WebhookStatus.ACTIVE,
    }
)

x-codeSamples.label: Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$webhookId = '748395130237498700';

$webhook = $rewrite->webhooks->update($webhookId, [
  'endpoint' => 'https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite-v2',
  'events' => ['sms.delivered', 'sms.failed'],
  'status' => 'ACTIVE',
]);

x-codeSamples.label: Ruby
x-codeSamples.source:
require "rewrite"

rewrite = Rewrite::Client.new(api_key: ENV.fetch("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

webhook_id = "748395130237498700"

webhook = rewrite.webhooks.update(
  webhook_id,
  endpoint: "https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite-v2",
  events: ["sms.delivered", "sms.failed"],
  status: "ACTIVE"
)

x-codeSamples.label: Kotlin
x-codeSamples.source:
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.Rewrite
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.models.webhooks.UpdateWebhookOptions

fun main() {
  val rewrite = Rewrite(System.getenv("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

  val webhookId = "748395130237498700"

  val webhook = rewrite.webhooks.update(
    webhookId,
    UpdateWebhookOptions(
      endpoint = "https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite-v2",
      events = listOf("sms.delivered", "sms.failed"),
      status = "ACTIVE"
    )
  )

  println(webhook)
}

x-codeSamples.label: Swift
x-codeSamples.source:
import Foundation
import RewriteSDK

let rewrite = Rewrite(apiKey: ProcessInfo.processInfo.environment["REWRITE_API_KEY"] ?? "")

let webhookId = "748395130237498700"

let webhook = try await rewrite.webhooks.update(
  webhookId,
  endpoint: "https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite-v2",
  events: ["sms.delivered", "sms.failed"],
  status: "ACTIVE"
)

print(webhook)

bearerAuth.description: Envoyez votre clé API via `Authorization: Bearer <api-key>`.

after.name: after
after.description: ID de curseur unique pour récupérer les éléments après cette valeur.

before.name: before
before.description: ID de curseur unique pour récupérer les éléments avant cette valeur.

persist.description: Indique si une autre page peut être demandée via `next`.

next.description: Curseur pour demander la page suivante (`after`).

data.description: Aucune donnée n'est renvoyée pour cette réponse.

OkEmptyResponse.description: Réponse réussie. Cet endpoint ne renvoie aucune donnée.

WebhookEventType.description: Types d'événements webhook pris en charge.

WebhookCreateBody.description: Créer un webhook pour recevoir les événements SMS.

WebhookUpdateBody.description: Mettre à jour l'endpoint webhook, les événements abonnés, le nom ou le statut.
